encoding: UTF-8 (VOCALOID6 V6.2+ supports UTF-8 lyrics; user must select UTF-8 in Import dialog)
track_naming: Track 0: VOCALOID, Track 1: Main Vocal (via FF 03 meta event)

lost_fields.reason: VOCALOID6 uses its own phoneme system; only lyric text is preserved via MIDI lyric meta event
MIDI baseline does not carry confidence
MIDI baseline does not distinguish manual/transcription/generation
VOCALOID6 imports single vocal track; multi-stem info lost
VOCALOID6 expresses rests as gaps between notes, no explicit rest event
Only syllable-level lyrics are written to MIDI; LyricRegion grouping lost
MIDI does not carry audio references
VOCALOID6 assumes first tempo at position 0
VOCALOID6 does not support stem mixer

preserved_fields: syllable.text (as MIDI lyric meta event FF 05)
user_workflow: 5. Confirm track name 'Main Vocal' is selected as vocal track
6. Visually verify notes and lyrics in piano roll
7. Manually adjust phonemes for each note using VOCALOID6 phoneme panel
